title: ochna ovalis
intro: Ochna ovalis, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant or bird's eye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It is native to southern Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Ochna ovalis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
